messages.content:
Found 5 jobs:
1. Gen AI Engineer
Description: Role: Software Engineer
Experience Required: 
Key Skills: 
Tech Stack: 
CTC: 
Main Responsibilities: 

- Works independently with a broader overview on the project
- Participates in communications with partners and clients, when needed
- Understands and follows the release processes in the company
- Participates in requirements analysis, development, unit testing and documentation
- Writes quality code to fit unique customer needs and configurations
- Troubleshoots and debugs (with some guidance from senior team members if needed)
- Provides mentoring to junior Software Engineers
- Delivers trainings and participates in knowledge sharing
- Achieves better understanding of the company platform and processes and suggests improvements
2. AI Engineer
Description: Role: Senior AI(NLP) Engineer
Experience Required: 3-6 years
Key Skills: 
- Proficiency in Python
- Knowledge of C++, Java, and JS
- Solid understanding of neural networks
- Proficient in deep learning models using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Keras
- Understanding of NLP related techniques
- Experience in evaluating NLP models
- Familiarity with GPU and related technologies
- Familiarity with Python libraries such as Spacy, NLTK, NumPy, Pandas, and scikit-learn
Tech Stack: 
- Python
- TensorFlow
- PyTorch
- Keras
- Spacy
- NLTK
- NumPy
- Pandas
- scikit-learn
CTC: 
Main Responsibilities: 
- Review and analyze existing NLP models
- Modify and finetune existing state of the art pre-trained generic NLP models
- Create new/modify model architectures and train them from scratch
- Test and refine models and systems based on real-world data and feedback
- Evaluate project requirements, plan and manage the roadmap of a project
- Present findings and insights in a clear and concise manner to stakeholders
- Collaborate and help to integrate and deploy AI systems into broader product architecture
- Conduct research to stay updated on emerging NLP and AI technologies and trends
- Automate data preprocessing and annotation processes to streamline workflow efficiency
- Maintain comprehensive documentation for algorithms, implementations, and evaluations
- Mentor junior engineers and provide strategic guidance on project development
3. Gen AI - Engineer
Description: Role: 
Software Engineer - Generative AI

Experience Required: 
3+ years of experience in software development

Key Skills: 
- Python (Flask, REST, async programming)
- Generative AI and LLM-based applications
- RAG system, embeddings, vector databases
- Agentic frameworks (LangChain 1.0, LangGraph, ReAct, OpenAI Assistants, or custom agents)
- AWS Cloud (ECS, S3, API Gateway, IAM, Bedrock)
- API development, microservices, containerization
- CI/CD pipelines, Docker, GitLab/GitHub Actions

Tech Stack: 
- Python
- Flask
- AWS Cloud
- LangChain 1.0
- LangGraph
- OpenAI tools
- Custom agents
- RAG pipelines
- Embeddings
- Vector databases
- Chunking strategies
- Vector search systems (PGVector, FAISS, etc.)
- MCP / tool-integration frameworks

CTC: 
Not specified

Main Responsibilities: 
- Generative AI Design & Development
- Python & Cloud
- Collaboration

5. AI Engineer
Description: Role: AI Engineer
Experience Required: 3+ years
Key Skills: 
- Python
- TensorFlow
- PyTorch
- Scikit-learn
- NLP
- Computer vision
- Deep learning
- Data preprocessing
- Feature engineering
- Model evaluation
- REST APIs
- Model deployment
- Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
- SQL/NoSQL databases
- Data processing tools
Tech Stack: 
- Python
- TensorFlow
- PyTorch
- Scikit-learn
- NLP
- Computer vision
- Deep learning
- Data preprocessing
- Feature engineering
- Model evaluation
- REST APIs
- Model deployment
- Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
- SQL/NoSQL databases
- Data processing tools
CTC: Competitive compensation & benefits, ESOPs and international assignments
Main Responsibilities: 
- Design, develop, test, and deploy AI/ML models and solutions
- Work with structured and unstructured data to build predictive, classification, and recommendation models
- Implement and optimize machine learning algorithms, deep learning models, and NLP solutions
- Collaborate with data engineers to build scalable data pipelines and ensure data quality
- Integrate AI models into production systems and applications using APIs and microservices
- Perform data analysis, feature engineering, and model evaluation
- Ensure AI solutions follow best practices for security, scalability, and performance
- Stay updated with the latest AI/ML trends, tools, and research
apply 5 jobs on naukri.com for ai engineer role
